name: McMillan James Equipment Company (MJEC)
message: [AI generated] McMillan James Equipment Company (MJEC) specializes in providing end-to-end HVAC solutions for commercial and industrial applications. The company, headquartered in Texas, USA, offers a variety of services, including system design, equipment sales, installation, and maintenance. MJEC prides itself on implementing innovative technologies to improve indoor air quality and energy efficiency.
